violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. All items on the buffet cooler are maintaining an internal temperature of 49-50 F.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was reused or used more than one time. A pepsi cup was stored in the sunflower seeds.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 41F or below during display or service. Several potentially hazardous food items on the buffet are keeping an internal temperature of 49-50 F.
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
